title: begonia horticola
intro: Begonia horticola is a species of flowering plant in the Begoniaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Begonia horticola is often made into a tea or tincture, and can also be applied topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
